composer.tool_nodejs_rules_body:
The core of `definitionId: tool_nodejs` is the **`script` field**—must write a complete executable shell/node command.
- `script`: Pipeline spawns directly, stdout becomes result, exit code determines success/failure
- `body`: When `script` exists, it serves only as human-readable comment, **will NOT be executed**
- `script` supports `${}` placeholders referencing input slots and system variables (workspaceRoot, runDir, etc.), values are auto shell-quoted
- **Do NOT** wrap `${workspaceRoot}` etc. with extra double quotes (e.g., `node "${workspaceRoot}/..."`); write `node ${workspaceRoot}/...` instead, otherwise path will contain extra quotes causing execution failure
- **Forbidden** to only write natural language description in `body` without `script`—this leads to no executable code at runtime
- If logic is too complex to write complete `script`, use `agent_subAgent` instead (also change definitionId)
composer.task_instruction: Please complete only the above single task, no extra modifications. After completion, sync UI per context instructions.
composer.fix_task_title: ## Task: Fix flow.yaml to pass validate-flow
composer.fix_errors_intro: The following errors must be **all eliminated** (same rules as CLI `agentflow validate` / `validate-flow.mjs`):
composer.fix_constraints_body:
- **Only** edit the "flow definition file" `flow.yaml` in context, do not modify unrelated files.
- Prefer minimal changes: add edges, fix sourceHandle/targetHandle, role, model, instance structure, etc.

runner.cursor_account_limit: [agentflow] Cursor account limit: detected Auto-only support, auto-retrying once (Auto)...

tool.nodejs_script_hint: script success/failure determined by exit code (0=success), stdout directly becomes result slot content (plain text, e.g., console.log).
